placement_rules: Place as a normal Housing Tile. Knight only.

notes: Retired: Steward Houses/Homes are removed from the current rules. Steward powers are player powers.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Social Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect, once per Season: Resolve 1 active Burden.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to Ruins terrain.
benefit: Activated Effect: Exchange up to 5 total resources in the Warehouse for the same number of non-Goods resources in any mix. Or Exchange 5 total resources in the warehouse for 3 Goods.
When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Wellbeing Tile.
benefit: When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Social Tile.
benefit: Once per Season, when any player places a housing tile adjacent to this tile, that tile costs 0 Resources. The tile must still satisfy all placement requirements and action costs.

placement_rules: Place on Water terrain.
benefit: Passive: If placed adjacent to Water terrain, this tile connects its connected settlement network to every other tile placed adjacent to Water terrain. This does not permit normal tile placement on Water unless a tile explicitly allows it.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Housing Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect, once per Season: Remove 1 Strain from one Housing, Social, or Wellbeing Tile.
When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: Once per round, when any player places a tile adjacent to this tile, reduce that tile's cost by 2 resource of the group's choice. Cost reductions cannot reduce costs below 0.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: When placed & When Activated, While this tile is not Overstrained, Travel Tiles in this tile's connected settlement network gain 1 Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Merchant Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect, once per Season: Resolve 1 active Burden.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Dig Site.
benefit: Passive: Once per round, When an adjacent Dig Site is activated for Resource production, gain 2 additional resources of types that Dig Site can produce.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Gatherers Lodge.
benefit: Passive: Once per round, when an adjacent Gatherers Lodge is activated for Production, gain +2 Herbs.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Farmstead.
benefit: Passive: Once per round, when an adjacent Farmstead is activated for Production, gain +2 Food.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Mine Shaft tile.
benefit: Passive: Once per round, when an adjacent Mine Shaft tile is activated for Production, gain +2 resources of types produced by Mine Shaft.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Lumber Yard.
benefit: Passive: Once per round, when an adjacent Lumber Yard is activated for Production, gain +2 resources of types Lumber Yard can produce.

Passive: You may move your Steward Token from this Stables to another placed Stables, or from a tile adjacent to this Stables to a tile adjacent to another placed Stables. The destination tile must not be Overstrained.
notes: Unlocks Two Copies

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Mine Shaft tile.
benefit: When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

benefit: When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

benefit: When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

benefit: Passive: When players resolve an active Burden, remove 1 Strain from 1 placed tile.

benefit: When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

benefit: When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.

placement_rules: Place adjacent to a Travel Tile.
benefit: Activated Effect: Look at the top 3 cards of the Encounter Deck, then return them in any order.
When placed & When Activated: While this tile is not Overstrained, up to two adjacent tiles receive 1 Supported.
